metadata.name: AbhayVoiceAutomater
metadata.summary: A Python library by Abhay Mallik for automating speech-to-text transcription using Selenium. This library interacts with browser-based speech recognition apps, captures transcriptions, and saves them to a file for further use.Key Featuresare: i. Automates browser interaction for speech-to-text tasks. ii. Configured for headless Chrome with custom options. iii. Captures and writes transcribed output to a local file.
